name: Eiger BioPharmaceuticals Inc. R
summary: Eiger BioPharmaceuticals, Inc. is a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing therapies to treat serious diseases with an initial focus on the development and commercialization of therapies for rare diseases. The company's lead product is Zokinvy, used to treat Progeria and Progeroid Laminopathies. Eiger BioPharmaceuticals is headquartered in Palo Alto, California.
